title: Structure Query URL Parameters

url.description: URL to a publicly available file with structure data.

asym_id.description: Chain to base this search on - mutually-exclusive with 'assembly_id'.

assembly_id.description: Assembly to base this search on - mutually-exclusive with 'asym_id'.

description: Fetch structure file from a URL in one of the following formats: cif, bcif, pdb. Content can be gzipped.
